Staging: Temporary storage for event details, if whole event is not ready to be put into eventDetails.json

title: Villans Pubcrawl
description:
Semester one pubcrawl is back again, this year with the theme of fictional villains.
Dress up, drink, and party along on a bus with 5 stops around Perth, departing from varsity and landing in the city for the end of the night.

Tickets will sell fast!
